name: attio
description: Query and manage records, objects, and lists in Attio CRM

tools.name: List Objects
tools.description: List object types in the Attio workspace (people, companies, deals, and custom objects)

tools.name: Query Records
tools.description: Query records of an object with optional filters and sorts

object.description: Object slug or ID, e.g. people, companies, deals

offset.description: Number of records to skip for pagination

historicalSummary.omitted: full attribute value histories and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Record
tools.description: Get a single record of an object by ID

object.description: Object slug or ID, e.g. people, companies, deals

tools.name: Create Record
tools.description: Create a new record of an object (person, company, deal, or custom object)

object.description: Object slug or ID, e.g. people, companies, deals

tools.name: Update Record
tools.description: Update attribute values on an existing record

object.description: Object slug or ID, e.g. people, companies, deals

data.description: Partial record payload with values to update, e.g. { "values": { ... } }

tools.name: List Lists
tools.description: List all lists in the Attio workspace

prompts.title: Find a company
prompts.prompt: Query my Attio companies for a name and show the matching records with their key attributes.

prompts.title: Add a person
prompts.prompt: Create a new person record in Attio with a name and email address.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Attio OAuth Setup

steps.title: Create an Attio app
steps.description: Go to the Attio developer dashboard at https://build.attio.com/ and create a new app. Any Attio workspace (including the free plan) can be used for development.

steps.title: Configure OAuth
steps.description: In the app's OAuth settings, add the redirect URI <your-app-url>/api/auth/attio/callback and select the scopes object_configuration:read, record_permission:read-write, and list_configuration:read.

steps.title: Set credentials
steps.description: Copy the client ID and client secret from the app settings into your .env as ATTIO_CLIENT_ID and ATTIO_CLIENT_SECRET.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Complete the OAuth flow, then run the List Objects tool followed by Query Records on the people object.

notes: Attio access tokens expire; refresh tokens are exchanged at https://app.attio.com/oauth/token with grant_type=refresh_token
Client credentials are sent in the POST body (application/x-www-form-urlencoded) at the token endpoint
Record values use Attio's attribute-value format: values are arrays of { value } entries keyed by attribute slug
